question.label: Recognized work
question.name: What kind of work do you think gets recognized here?
question.description: Clarifies his model of what the organisation values so the underlying mismatch is more concrete.

answer: I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.

assessment.note: He names the absence of clear recognition criteria rather than reassurance, signaling a mild negative growth signal; also reveals a strong clarity issue, but clarity was off-signature.

new_queue.label: Arrive here
new_queue.name: Before we go further, what feels most important to put on the table today?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
